notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jasson Domínguez steals (3) 3rd base. Cody Bellinger steals (9) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Chase Burns picks off Anthony Volpe at 1st on throw to first baseman Sal Stewart.

notableEvents.label: Max Schuemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Schuemann flies out to right fielder Noelvi Marte.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario singles on a fly ball to center fielder Blake Dunn. José Caballero to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Paul Goldschmidt pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt flies out to right fielder Noelvi Marte.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer doubles (13) on a ground ball to center fielder José Caballero. Spencer Steer to 3rd. Spencer Steer advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by center fielder José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario lines out sharply to center fielder Blake Dunn.
